ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., CS101) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the course can accommodate */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "remaining_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats remaining in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., open, restricted, closed) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisite_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of prerequisite course IDs */,
  "cross_listed_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of cross-listed course IDs */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the course is online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the department's website */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the department's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the instructor (e.g., PhD, MS) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic advisor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the student is enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course, if applicable */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student in the course */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the student is auditing the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is waiting for */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the student on the waitlist */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status of the student (e.g., waiting, enrolled, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prerequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cross_listed_courses" (
  "cross_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-listed course entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is cross-listed */,
  "cross_list_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cross-listed course */,
  "cross_list_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cross-listed course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cross_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cross_listed_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cross_listed_courses_cross_list_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("cross_list_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who posted the review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who taught the course */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific course offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who posted the review */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the instructor taught */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific course offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_reviews_course_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_reviews_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the advisor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the advisor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advising_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advising note */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being advised */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "advising_type" TEXT /* Type of advising session (e.g., academic, career) */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps or action items from the advising session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advising_notes_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advising_notes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_heads" (
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department head */,
  "department_head_name" TEXT /* Full name of the department head */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department head */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the head manages */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the department head */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_heads_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Section number of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the course is online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, manage) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
